member_group_no.nulltext: ดูทั้งหมด ไม่ต้องเลือกนะจ๊ะ

root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)as mem_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_debtor.debtor_desc , sc_mem_m_ucf_other_code.mem_type_desc , sc_mem_m_ucf_shareloan_status.description , sc_mem_m_ucf_othersaving.saving_name , tab_lon.loan_contract_no , tab_lon.principal_balance , tab_lon.begining_of_contract , tab_lon.loan_approve_amount
, tab_coll.loan_contract_no , tab_coll.ref_own_no , tab_coll.collateral_description
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered cross join sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group cross join sc_mem_m_ucf_debtor cross join sc_mem_m_ucf_other_code cross join sc_mem_m_ucf_shareloan_status cross join sc_mem_m_ucf_othersaving
left join (select sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract)as begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_contract where sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = 'ป' )tab_lon on sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = tab_lon.membership_no
left join (select sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description from sc_lon_m_contract_coll where sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' )tab_coll on tab_lon.loan_contract_no = tab_coll.loan_contract_no
where 1=1 and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_debtor.debtor_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.debtor_code and sc_mem_m_ucf_other_code.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.other_status and sc_mem_m_ucf_shareloan_status.shareloan_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.shareloan_code and sc_mem_m_ucf_othersaving.other_saving_member = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.other_saving_member and (sc_mem_m_ucf_debtor.debtor_desc like '%อายัด%' or sc_mem_m_ucf_other_code.mem_type_desc like '%อายัด%' or sc_mem_m_ucf_shareloan_status.description like '%อายัด%' or sc_mem_m_ucf_othersaving.saving_name like '%อายัด%') /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
